title: The World Reacts — Part 2
description: The Marines, pirates, and rulers face the aftermath of Doflamingo’s defeat.
scene: On pages 9–13, Luffy, King Riku, Sabo, Marines, Trafalgar Law deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gyAA AAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I WON'T CARRY ANYMORE BECAUSE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I know ace would never forgive me if I did!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Hello? Sabo-kun? Where the hell are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Burgess was trying to hunt down luffy just now so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I got really worried and tried to call you on the den den den mushi but you just wouldn't pick up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh. My bad. Didn't notice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: didn't no...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's fine, though. I've already dealt with the matter. More importantly,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Koala! Have 8 you found the list?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes! Of course I have! Sheesh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well, why don't you call for a shi-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've already called for one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: okay. Go and group up with hack under- ground.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hack and I and everyone else are already down here, waiting on you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Who told you to hang up, Npeabrain!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Koala-san, please, deep breaths...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The Donquijote family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: EXECU- Tives...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: All eight of them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: the three top executives as well... confirmed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Care- full!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Almost all of the executives are devil fruit users!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Make it your top priority...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: to properly restrain every last one with sea stone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Roger that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What about our report to head- quarters?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Well,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: ISSHOU- San has...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: asked us to hold off on that for now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Neighboring country Apple Nine Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Looks like there's a transmission feed coming in from dress- Rosa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: What is it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: something from King Doflamingo? That guy gives me the creeps...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: We are broad- casting from dress- Rosa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: with an announce- went for its neighboring three coun- tries!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: i am marine hQ vice admiral...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: A Marine ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: May- NARD!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: What's with all the rubble behind him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: What you are looking at...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Is the current state of dress- Rosa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: What the hell happened over there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Dress- Rosa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: It seems we're transmitting smoothly to the three countries...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Inside the video Den den mushi's broadcast range!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Good! I'll fill them in on all the details...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: take one of the video den den den den den's and, as ordered,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: whirrr

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Go after Isshou- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Roger that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: King Riku- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: No, please... don't say that, I beg of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Though misconceptions about what actually happened appear to have been dispelled, I simply cannot return to the throne.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: No! You are the rightful ruler of this country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: We're fed up with violence!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: What if... What if everyone in this country was with you? Then would you consider it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Wait a minute... when it comes right down to it, those of the Riku clan are pushovers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: Recents events are nothing if not proof of that very fact.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: We don't care if we meet our Doom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: We just want you to turn your back on wars as the "King that refuses to fight!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: And if that means this country goes under, well... we can all live with that!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
